languages.text: "Поправка 310 запрещает делиться с мирянами информацией, включенной в тайный протокол внутреннего расследования. Но доказательств достаточно".
"Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."
languages.original_text: "Поправка 310 запрещает делиться с мирянами информацией, включенной в тайный протокол внутреннего расследования. Но доказательств достаточно".

traits.locale_text: "Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."
"Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."
"Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."
"Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."
"Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."

languages.text: 「改正310条では、内部調査の規定が適用されるデータは、一般の人々に開示することを禁止しています。私は、十分な証拠を集めたことを確認するだけです。」
languages.original_text: "Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."

traits.locale_text: 「改正310条では、内部調査の規定が適用されるデータは、一般の人々に開示することを禁止しています。私は、十分な証拠を集めたことを確認するだけです。」

languages.text: “第310条修正案规定，如果数据属于内部调查协议范围，则不得向教外人士透露。我只能确认，我已收集到足够的证据。”
languages.original_text: "Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."

traits.locale_text: “第310条修正案规定，如果数据属于内部调查协议范围，则不得向教外人士透露。我只能确认，我已收集到足够的证据。”

languages.text: "310 Sayılı Değişiklik, eğer veriler iç soruşturma protokollerine tabi ise fânilere bilgi ifşa edilmesini yasaklar. Sadece yeterli kanıt topladığımı onaylayacağım."
languages.original_text: "Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."

traits.locale_text: "310 Sayılı Değişiklik, eğer veriler iç soruşturma protokollerine tabi ise fânilere bilgi ifşa edilmesini yasaklar. Sadece yeterli kanıt topladığımı onaylayacağım."

languages.text: «La enmienda 310 prohíbe la divulgación de información al personal laico si los datos están sujetos a protocolos de investigación interna. Solo puedo confirmar que he recopilado pruebas suficientes».
languages.original_text: "Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."

traits.locale_text: «La enmienda 310 prohíbe la divulgación de información al personal laico si los datos están sujetos a protocolos de investigación interna. Solo puedo confirmar que he recopilado pruebas suficientes».

languages.text: « L'amendement 310 interdit de transmettre des informations aux profanes si les données sont soumises aux protocoles d'enquête interne. Je me contenterai donc de confirmer que j'ai réuni des preuves suffisantes. »
languages.original_text: "Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."

traits.locale_text: « L'amendement 310 interdit de transmettre des informations aux profanes si les données sont soumises aux protocoles d'enquête interne. Je me contenterai donc de confirmer que j'ai réuni des preuves suffisantes. »

languages.text: "Anhang 310 verbietet die Weitergabe von Informationen an Laien, wenn die Daten Teil der internen Untersuchungsprotokolle sind. Ich werde nur bestätigen, dass ich ausreichend Beweise gesammelt habe."
languages.original_text: "Amendment 310 prohibits disclosing information to the laity if the data is subject to the internal investigation protocols. I will only confirm that I have gathered sufficient evidence."

traits.locale_text: "Anhang 310 verbietet die Weitergabe von Informationen an Laien, wenn die Daten Teil der internen Untersuchungsprotokolle sind. Ich werde nur bestätigen, dass ich ausreichend Beweise gesammelt habe."
